mapper.select: select lt_num, lt_title, lt_regDate, lt_jobType, lt_status from lecRecruit r order by lt_num desc

select lt_num, lt_title, lt_regDate, lt_jobType, lt_status from lecRecruit
lt_title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
order by lt_num desc

select count (*) from lecRecruit
lt_title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
mapper.insert: insert into lecRecruit (lt_num, lt_title, lt_content, lt_regDate, lt_startDate, lt_endDate, lt_jobType, lt_status, lt_views) values (#{lt_num}, #{lt_title}, #{lt_content}, #{lt_regDate}, #{lt_startDate}, #{lt_endDate}, #{lt_jobType}, #{lt_status}, #{lt_views})
mapper.select: select lecRecruit_seq.nextval as lt_num from dual
